pre_game.message: Hey, I'm H. First time doing something like this? I gotta say, I'm pretty nervous but also excited—heard there's real money on the line here, and I'm hoping to take some home for my family.

Hey H, nice to meet you! Yeah, same here—first time for me too. I'm definitely nervous but pumped about it. Family's counting on me to bring something back, so I'm gonna give it my best shot. What kind of game do you think it'll be?

Honestly, I have no idea—could be anything from trivia to some kind of strategy thing. But whatever it is, I'm thinking it probably rewards people who work together or at least understand what everyone else is doing. You got any guesses?

Yeah, I've been thinking the same thing—if there's a shared prize pool, it's gotta involve some kind of cooperation or at least figuring out what everyone else is thinking. Maybe it's like a game theory thing? Either way, I'm definitely gonna pay attention to how people react and what they say. Seems like knowing who you can trust might be just as important as the rules themselves.

That's smart thinking—trust is probably huge in something like this. I'm gonna do the same, watch how people act. Maybe we can keep an eye out for each other too, you know? At least we know we're both here for our families, so we're not coming in with crazy selfish vibes.

Yeah, I like that—having someone I can trust in the room definitely makes this feel less scary. We're on the same page about wanting to do right by our families, so I'm down to look out for each other. Just gotta see how this thing actually plays out once we get going.
Absolutely, man—I really appreciate that. Let's just stay real with each other through this thing, and we'll figure it out as we go. Whatever happens, at least we've got each other's back.
For sure, H—I'm with you all the way. Let's keep it honest with each other and see what this game throws at us. We got this.
Yeah, I really appreciate that, B. Let's stick together and play it smart. When the game starts, we'll figure out what's really going on and make our moves. Good luck out there, man.
Thanks man, same to you. I'm feeling good about this—let's keep it real and see what happens. Good luck out there.
You too, B. We've got this—let's play smart and remember what we talked about. See you in there.
